description_long: This object is a long, slender blade with a pronounced curve and a sharply pointed tip, resembling a stylized or fantasy sword. The blade appears to be single-edged, with a smooth, continuous cutting edge and a slightly thicker spine for structural support. The handle is straight and seamlessly integrated with the blade, lacking any visible grip wrapping or ergonomic contouring. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the blade from the handle, giving the object a minimalist and streamlined appearance. The entire object is a uniform dark metallic gray, with a matte or semi-gloss finish that suggests it is made primarily of metal. The design is simple and functional, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements.
description: A long, curved, single-edged sword with a pointed tip and a straight, unadorned handle, all in a dark metallic gray finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pronounced curve of the blade and the straight, integrated handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the thin, flat profile and the alignment of the three identical blades.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the curve and handle integration seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the uniform width and the pointed tips of the blades.
